mapper.select: /* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontCandidateMapper.selectFrontCandidateList */ SELECT CANDIDATE_SEQ /**/ , TOPIC_SEQ /**/ , NAME /**/ , INFO /**/ , PRICE /**/ , IMAGE_URL /**/ , LINK_URL /**/ , IS_FIXED /**/ , USE_YN /**/ , REGISTER_SEQ /**/ , REGISTER_IP /**/ , REGISTRATION_DT /**/ , UPDATER_SEQ /**/ , UPDATER_IP /**/ , UPDATE_DT /**/ FROM CANDIDATE WHERE USE_YN = true AND TOPIC_SEQ = #{topicSeq}

/* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontCandidateMapper.selectFrontCandidatePage */ SELECT CANDIDATE_SEQ /**/ , TOPIC_SEQ /**/ , NAME /**/ , INFO /**/ , PRICE /**/ , IMAGE_URL /**/ , LINK_URL /**/ , IS_FIXED /**/ , USE_YN /**/ , REGISTER_SEQ /**/ , REGISTER_IP /**/ , REGISTRATION_DT /**/ , UPDATER_SEQ /**/ , UPDATER_IP /**/ , UPDATE_DT /**/ FROM CANDIDATE WHERE USE_YN = true AND TOPIC_SEQ = #{topicSeq}
/* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontCandidateMapper.selectFrontCandidateCount */ SELECT COUNT(*) FROM CANDIDATE WHERE USE_YN = true AND TOPIC_SEQ = #{topicSeq}

/* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontCandidateMapper.selectFrontCandidate */ SELECT CANDIDATE_SEQ /**/ , TOPIC_SEQ /**/ , NAME /**/ , INFO /**/ , PRICE /**/ , IMAGE_URL /**/ , LINK_URL /**/ , IS_FIXED /**/ , USE_YN /**/ , REGISTER_SEQ /**/ , REGISTER_IP /**/ , REGISTRATION_DT /**/ , UPDATER_SEQ /**/ , UPDATER_IP /**/ , UPDATE_DT /**/ FROM CANDIDATE WHERE CANDIDATE_SEQ = #{candidateSeq}
mapper.update: /* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontCandidateMapper.updateFrontCandidate */ UPDATE CANDIDATE SET UPDATER_SEQ = #{updaterSeq} /*수정자_시퀀스*/ , UPDATER_IP = #{updaterIp} /*수정자_아이피*/ , UPDATE_DT = NOW(3) /*수정_일시*/ , TOPIC_SEQ = #{topicSeq} /**/ , NAME = #{name} /**/ , INFO = #{info} /**/ , PRICE = #{price} /**/ , IMAGE_URL = #{imageUrl} /**/ , LINK_URL = #{linkUrl} /**/ , IS_FIXED = #{isFixed} /**/ WHERE CANDIDATE_SEQ = #{candidateSeq}

/* com.matjzing.mapper.FrontCandidateMapper.deleteFrontCandidate */ UPDATE CANDIDATE SET UPDATER_SEQ = #{updaterSeq} /*수정자_시퀀스*/ , UPDATER_IP = #{updaterIp} /*수정자_아이피*/ , UPDATE_DT = NOW(3) /*수정_일시*/ , USE_YN = FALSE WHERE CANDIDATE_SEQ = #{candidateSeq}
